The '''sharnaff''' was a large herd animal found on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It appeared similar to a [[Ronto/Legends|ronto]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], as well as the [[Piket/Legends|piket]] from [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] and was a favorite prey of scouts and hunters.

The [[Nomad greatcoat]], a traditional outfit of the inhabitants of the [[Nomad Mountains]], was made from tanned hides
of sharnaffs.<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
